  "findings": [
    "Ladder-type joint reinforcement spacing exceeds the maximum limits specified by TMS 402/602."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR).",
    "Stop further masonry work or grouting in the affected area.",
    "Require the subcontractor to submit a remediation plan, which may involve structural engineering review or reconstruction of the non-compliant courses."
  ],
  "rationale": "TMS 402/602 prescribes strict maximum vertical spacing limits for joint reinforcement (typically 16 inches on center for structural masonry). Exceeding this spacing reduces the lateral load capacity and crack control of the wall, failing to meet the structural code requirements.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 402/602 Section 6.2",
    "TMS 602 Article 3.4 B.6"
  ]
}
